evals.prompt: I want to rename the `skip-test` input to `no-test` across all CI workflows. What's the blast radius?
evals.expected_output: Should identify all consumer repos that currently pass skip-test (copilot-overlay uses it). Should warn that renaming an input is a breaking change for any caller already using it. Should suggest adding no-test as an alias or doing a two-step migration.

assertions.name: identifies_copilot_overlay
assertions.description: Must identify copilot-overlay as using skip-test

assertions.name: warns_breaking_change
assertions.value: Renaming an input breaks existing callers
assertions.description: Must warn this is a breaking change

assertions.name: runs_live_check
assertions.description: Should query live repo state rather than relying on cached data

evals.prompt: Which repos are still on their old inline CI and haven't adopted hookshot callers yet?
evals.expected_output: Should run the discovery script to check which repos have hookshot references vs only inline CI. Should list repos with and without hookshot adoption.

assertions.name: queries_live_state
assertions.description: Should query GitHub API for current workflow state

assertions.name: categorizes_repos
assertions.value: Lists repos that have adopted hookshot callers separately from those that haven't
assertions.description: Must categorize repos by adoption status

evals.prompt: I just added a new required input to node-ci.yml without a default. Is that going to break anything?
evals.expected_output: Should immediately flag this as a breaking change. Should identify all node-ci consumers (copilot-overlay, copilot-money-mcp). Should recommend making the input optional with a default value instead.

assertions.name: flags_breaking
assertions.value: Adding a required input without a default breaks existing callers
assertions.description: Must flag this as a breaking change

assertions.name: identifies_node_consumers
assertions.description: Must identify the Node.js consumer repos

assertions.name: recommends_optional
assertions.value: Make the input optional with a default
